name: mobile-udf
description: Mobile UDF: Viewâ†’ViewModelâ†’UseCaseâ†’Repositoryâ†’DataSource layering, single source of truth.

rules.guidance: Layer dependency: View depends on ViewModel; ViewModel depends on UseCase interfaces; UseCase depends on Repository interfaces; Repository depends on DataSource interfaces.
Repository is the SSOT. UI state is derived from the repository stream/flow. No duplicate state held in ViewModel that diverges from the repository.
UseCase and Repository interfaces must not import platform types (Context, Activity, UIViewController). Platform dependencies belong in DataSource or ViewModel only.
Use reactive streams (Flow/StateFlow on Android, AsyncStream/@Observable on iOS) to propagate state changes from Repository through ViewModel to View.
